---
title: Support and Contact
---

If you have questions about DMPonline or encounter problems when using the tool, send an email to [rdm@vu.nl](mailto:rdm@vu.nl).

For questions specifically related to GDPR registration, reach out to your faculty's 🔒[Privacy Champion](https://vu.nl/en/employee/privacy-and-information-security/privacy-champions-information), who can provide specialised guidance for your research context.
